en.extract:
The white-naped jay (Cyanocorax cyanopogon) is a species of bird in the family Corvidae. It is endemic to Brazil - where it is known as the Gralha Cancã or the Cancão. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.
They are capable of interbreeding with plush-crested jays, and hybrids between the species have been observed. The species are visually similar and often are mistaken for each other.
They sometimes serve as a food source for humans. They are also sometimes kept as pets.

The '''white-naped jay''' ('''''Cyanocorax cyanopogon''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Corvidae]]. It is [[endemic]] to [[Brazil]] - where it is known as the ''Gralha Cancã'' or the ''Cancão''. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical dry forest]] and [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].

They are capable of interbreeding with [[Plush-crested jay|plush-crested jays]], and hybrids between the species have been observed.<ref name=":0">{{Cite journal |last1=Apolinario |first1=Cristiane |last2=Silveira |first2=Luis Fabio |date=2019-09-16 |title=Hybridism between Cyanocorax chrysops and Cyanocorax cyanopogon (Aves: Corvidae) in Brazil |journal = Zoologia |volume=36 |pages= 1–7 |doi=10.3897/zoologia.36.e32138 |url=http://dx.doi.org/10.3897/zoologia.36.e32138.suppl1 |access-date=2023-12-21 |doi-access=free}}</ref> The species are visually similar and often are mistaken for each other.<ref name=":0" />

They sometimes serve as a food source for humans. They are also sometimes kept as pets.<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Bezerra |first1=Dandara Monalisa Mariz |last2=de Araujo |first2=Helder Farias Pereira |last3=Alves |first3=Rômulo Romeu Nóbrega |date=2019-07-26 |title=Understanding the use of wild birds in a priority conservation area of Caatinga, a Brazilian tropical dry forest |journal=Environment, Development and Sustainability |volume=22 |issue=6 |pages=5297–5316 |doi=10.1007/s10668-019-00425-1 |s2cid=199473264 |issn=1387-585X}}</ref>

zh.extract:
白枕蓝鸦（学名：Cyanocorax cyanopogon）是一種鸦科蓝鸦属鳥類，亦为巴西的特有种。全球活动范围约为3,070,000平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
白枕蓝鸦的平均体重约为146.0克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的湿润低地林和亚热带或热带的旱林。
